jobs.title: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
jobs.summary: The detailed RRB ALP Notification 2026 (CEN 01/2026) was released for 11127 Assistant Loco Pilot posts. The online application process was from 15th May 2026 to 14th June 2026. The application correction window was open from 17th June to 26th June 2026. Eligibility includes Matriculation (10th) with ITI, Diploma, Apprenticeship, and Engineering Degree.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering posts where Mechanical is eligible are "moderate".

jobs.title: Experienced Professionals (Fixed Term Basis)

jobs.title: Scientist C, D, E (Lateral Recruitment Scheme)

jobs.fitLabel: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is an eligible degree for some Scientist posts in DRDO. However, the candidate is primarily interested in Management and IT roles, not core mechanical engineering. IT posts requiring CS/IT/Electronics degrees would be 'gated' for this candidate.

jobs.title: Scientist C (Mechanical Engineering)

jobs.fitLabel: Core mechanical engineering role, which is not the candidate's primary interest. However, the candidate has a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and meets the experience requirement.

jobs.title: Scientist C (Computer Science & Engg / Electronics & Communication Engg)

jobs.fitLabel: IT/CS/Electronics role, which aligns with the candidate's interest and software engineering experience, but the candidate lacks the required CS/IT/Electronics degree (has B.Tech Mechanical).

jobs.title: Technician Recruitment (CEN 02/2026)
jobs.summary: The Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have released the official notification for CEN 02/2026 inviting online applications for 6,565 vacancies across two posts: Technician Grade I Signal and Technician Grade III. The online application process began on June 30, 2026, and candidates can submit their applications until July 29, 2026. For Technician Grade I Signal, eligibility includes a B.Sc. degree in Physics / Electronics / Computer Science / IT / Instrumentation OR a Degree / Diploma in Engineering in a relevant discipline. Technician Grade III requires Matriculation (10th pass) + ITI in a relevant trade or 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics for S&T trades.
jobs.fitLabel: The Technician Grade I Signal post, while accepting engineering degrees, is likely focused on Electronics/IT/CS for 'Signal' roles, making it 'gated' for a Mechanical Engineer. Technician Grade III requires ITI or 10+2 with specific science subjects, which is not a direct fit for a B.Tech Mechanical Engineer and is a lower-level technical role, not management or IT.
